name: PER_TASK_LIB_COM_CONDNS_VL
query: SELECT B.TASK_LIB_COM_CONDITION_ID, B.CHECKLIST_TASK_ID, B.BUSINESS_OBJECT_NAME, B.ENABLED_FLAG, T.MESSAGE_TEXT, B.BUSINESS_OBJECT_CRITERIA1, B.BUSINESS_OBJECT_CRITERIA2, B.BUSINESS_OBJECT_CRITERIA3, B.BUSINESS_OBJECT_CRITERIA4, B.BUSINESS_OBJECT_CRITERIA5, B.ROW_COUNT_LOWER_LIMIT, B.ROW_COUNT_UPPER_LIMIT, B.PERSON_CRITERIA1, B.PERSON_CRITERIA2, B.PERSON_CRITERIA3, B.PERSON_CRITERIA4, B.PERSON_CRITERIA5, B.PERSON_RULE_ID, B.OBJECT_RULE_ID, B.ENTERPRISE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM PER_TASK_LIB_COM_CONDNS_B B, PER_TASK_LIB_COM_CONDNS_TL T WHERE B.TASK_LIB_COM_CONDITION_ID = T.TASK_LIB_COM_CONDITION_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
